reviews.comment:
Imposible cargar combustible. Son lo mas lento que ví en mi vida. Encima permitieron que un hombre ocupe la zona de surtidor, (a pesar de ya haberle cargado y cobrado) para que se cambie los zapatos y su remera, en vez de pedirle que corra el auto para seguir cargado.
Nunca me pasó algo así.
Madrugada del 01/05/22, aproximadamente a la 01.10 am, primer surtidor del lado izquierdo. Terrible.

(Translated by Google)
It was impossible to get fuel. They're the slowest I've ever seen. On top of that, they let a man occupy the pump area (even though they'd already filled his tank and charged him) so he could change his shoes and shirt, instead of asking him to move his car so they could continue filling up.
I've never experienced anything like this. Early morning of May 1, 2022, around 1:10 am, first pump on the left. Awful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyMU1xVlhnEAE
